/usr/bin/c++  -pthread -O3 -DNDEBUG -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/create_marker.dir/link.d CMakeFiles/create_marker.dir/create_marker.cpp.o -o create_marker   -L/home/jayendra/cv-project/external/JuMarker/opencv_compat/lib  -Wl,-rpath,/home/jayendra/cv-project/external/JuMarker/opencv_compat/lib:/home/jayendra/cv-project/external/JuMarker/build-isolated/src ../src/libjumarker.so /home/jayendra/cv-project/external/JuMarker/opencv_compat/lib/libopencv_core.so /home/jayendra/cv-project/external/JuMarker/opencv_compat/lib/libopencv_imgproc.so /home/jayendra/cv-project/external/JuMarker/opencv_compat/lib/libopencv_imgcodecs.so /home/jayendra/cv-project/external/JuMarker/opencv_compat/lib/libopencv_calib3d.so /home/jayendra/cv-project/external/JuMarker/opencv_compat/lib/libopencv_videoio.so /home/jayendra/cv-project/external/JuMarker/opencv_compat/lib/libopencv_highgui.so /home/jayendra/cv-project/external/JuMarker/opencv_compat/lib/libopencv_features2d.so /home/jayendra/cv-project/external/JuMarker/opencv_compat/lib/libopencv_video.so
